'''βàösh-d-n-ng''' ('''kashadnengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wysshe|wysshe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-d-n-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wysshe|wysshe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàösh-d-n-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kashadnengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishadnengoko|thishadnengoko]] || [[word:jishadnengoko|jishadnengoko]] || [[word:shishadnengoko|shishadnengoko]] || [[word:kishadnengoko|kishadnengoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushadnengoko|thuthushadnengoko]] || [[word:jujushadnengoko|jujushadnengoko]] || [[word:shushushadnengoko|shushushadnengoko]] || [[word:kukushadnengoko|kukushadnengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshadnengoko|thoshadnengoko]] || [[word:joshadnengoko|joshadnengoko]] || [[word:shoshadnengoko|shoshadnengoko]] || [[word:koshadnengoko|koshadnengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠshadnengoko|thΟΠshadnengoko]] || [[word:jΟΠshadnengoko|jΟΠshadnengoko]] || [[word:shΟΠshadnengoko|shΟΠshadnengoko]] || [[word:kΟΠshadnengoko|kΟΠshadnengoko]]
|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
